data.title: Happy 11th Birthday, Dogecoin! Trader Anticipates 'Violent Upside Move' If 3-Week Accumulation Breaks
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE), the original meme coin, marks its 11th birthday today. Despite a 5% dip in the past 24 hours, traders remain optimistic about its next moves.

How To Earn $500 A Month From Oracle Stock Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
data.description: Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) will release Q2 FY2025 results on Dec. 9, with analysts expecting $1.48 EPS and $14.12B revenue. To earn $500 monthly from dividends, an investor would need to own $698,400 worth of ORCL or 3,750 shares.
